bug_description: The cumulative fraction is computed as `count / total` instead of `cumulative / total`. Using `count` (the individual value's count) rather than `cumulative` (the running total up to and including this value) gives a per-value relative frequency, not a cumulative fraction. All values except the last will have wrong cumulative_fraction values. The bug requires understanding the difference between per-item and running-sum semantics — the variable `cumulative` is updated correctly on the previous line but then not used in the fraction computation.
